api.badRequest: The request could not be processed
api.conflict: The request conflicts with the current state
api.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
api.internalError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
api.networkError: Unable to connect. Please check your connection and try again.
api.notFound: The requested resource was not found
api.tooManyRequests: Too many requests, please try again later
api.unprocessable: The request could not be processed

apiKey.nameTooLong: API key name must be 100 characters or fewer

auth.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists

auth.magicLinkExpired: This sign-in link has expired. Please request a new one.

auth.workspaceRequired: A workspace context is required for this request

webhook.eventInvalid: {event} is not a valid event type

webhook.urlInvalid: Webhook URL must be a valid HTTPS URL
webhook.urlPrivate: Webhook URL must not point to a private or reserved IP address

alerts.invalidMetric: Invalid alert metric. Allowed: recommendation_share, citation_count, sentiment_score, position_average
alerts.invalidCondition: Invalid alert condition. Allowed: drops_below, exceeds, changes_by_percent, changes_by_absolute

alerts.invalidDirection: Invalid alert direction. Allowed: any, increase, decrease
alerts.brandNotFound: Brand not found in this workspace
alerts.promptSetNotFound: Prompt set not found in this workspace
alerts.limitReached: Workspace alert rule limit reached (maximum {max, number})

validation.invalidLocale: Invalid locale format. Expected BCP 47 tag with region (e.g., {example})
validation.invalidMetricEnum: Invalid metric. Must be one of: {allowed}
validation.tooLong: {field} must be at most {max, plural, one {# character} other {# characters}}

visibility.brandRequired: A brand is required to view {scope}
visibility.brandsRequired: At least one brand must be specified (provide brandId or brandIds)
visibility.modelRunRequired: A modelRunId is required to view query fan-out
visibility.periodMisalignedMonthly: periodStart must be aligned to the 1st of the month
visibility.periodMisalignedWeekly: periodStart must be aligned to Monday
visibility.promptSetRequired: A prompt set (market) is required to view {scope}

workspace.selfRemove: You cannot remove yourself from the workspace
workspace.selfRoleChange: You cannot change your own role
workspace.soleOwnerDemote: Cannot demote the sole workspace owner
workspace.soleOwnerRemove: Cannot remove the sole workspace owner

reports.fileUnavailable: Report file is no longer available

reports.maxBrands: A maximum of {max, number} brands can be included in a single report

reports.templatesCommercial: Custom report templates require a commercial edition

notifications.userNotMember: User is not a member of this workspace
